text: Stepping from the quiet, structured order of a modern meeting space into the vibrant, stimulating energy of an R&D-themed exhibition, I feel the shift acutely. Here, the potential of innovation is splashed onto the walls, and words like "Responsive" and "Development" pulse with implicit possibility. I am drawn to the interplay between the calm, practical space behind me and the invitation to future-thinking in front of me. Inspiration and curiosity begin to stir. I feel invigorated by the engagement with ideas and the unfolding of human creativity.
